evals.prompt: We fixed the dark theme CodeMirror caret in Yuuzu-IDE. Pick the smallest credible verification plan before closeout.
evals.expected_output: A scoped plan that starts with focused editor/CSS contract tests, includes real runtime smoke for visible caret behavior, and avoids unrelated Cargo gates unless Rust changed.
expectations: Classifies the task as UI runtime or bugfix.
Includes focused tests for CodeMirror/editor rendering and CSS contracts.
Includes packaged app or browser/runtime verification for visible dark theme caret behavior.
Does not claim full release verification is required when no Rust or packaging behavior changed.

evals.prompt: Based on docs/html/yuuzu-ide-function-smoke-report-2026-06-22.html, reverify Git Graph flicker in the real debug app. What should we run?
evals.expected_output: A verification plan covering focused Git Graph regression tests, debug app build, Computer Use smoke, a .git watcher probe, and cleanup/evidence requirements.
expectations: Mentions focused Git Graph/controller tests before runtime smoke.
Uses `bun run tauri build --debug --bundles app` for the packaged app.
Includes a .git watcher probe and verifies commit detail does not reset to loading.
Includes cleanup of debug app and temporary probe files.
